verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've considered the leper in the day of his cleansing All his hope was in two turtle doves The thing that held him captive For most of his life Will finally be utterly destroyed And while she's fluttering her wings in the evening time Crying Holy, Holy unto the Lord It will surely bring full deliverance And set him free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sprinkle me speckled Dove Flying Holy, Holy, Holy Sprinkle me speckled Dove With Your precious holy blood and while You're flying on the eighth day With the blood of Your mate It's the only hope for a leper For his cleansing in that day

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus Christ when He came to earth Was led to Calvary He was crucified and his blood put on the Bride He was the perfect sacrifice that was slain for our sins So we could be free from the power of in-dwelling sin And when He hung in the midst of heaven and earth Spoiling principalities and powers He conquered worlds both seen and unseen When He cried, "It's is finished"
